ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition To Close The Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Ex Parte Petition For Order Dispensing With Bond
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman Macleod for the Executors.

Mr. Macleod provided case background and explained why they paid out the California accounts without a court order. Mr. Macleod also stated that he recieved a full accounting from Scotland which was filed with the Court this week. In addition, Mr. Macleod stated that he would file a final report and waiver of accounting asking for attorney's fees, and close of the estate. The Court stated that it can not exonerate the bond nunc pro tunc, but it can exonerate it as of today. The Court will think about language of the order. The Ex Parte Petition for Order Dispensing with Bond was granted (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of Petition to Terminate Estate was set for May 1, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. , in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
